leadText: The Quick Powder (Japanese: スピードパウダー Speed Powder) is a type of held item introduced in Generation IV. It boosts the Speed stat of a Ditto that holds it.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] This page is in need of spading . See its section on the spading page for more information, and how you can help. Reason: Does this item work when held by another Pokémon (such as Mew) transformed into Ditto? If held by a Ditto , doubles its Speed stat. It does not work when Ditto is transformed .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description D P Pt HG SS An item to be held by Ditto . Extremely fine yet hard, this odd powder boosts the Speed stat. Extremely fine yet hard, this odd powder boosts Ditto's Speed stat.
